chapter_title.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Ameer Ul Momineen

text: 86 - وَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَسَحَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَى اَلنَّعْلَيْنِ وَ لَمْ يَسْتَبْطِنِ اَلشِّرَاكَيْنِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.86 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"The Commander of the Faithful (as) wiped over his sandals and did not remove the straps”.
